title: D6 turbolaser
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''D6 turbolaser''' was manufactured by [[Taim & Bak/Legends|Taim & Bak]] for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]]. 5,000 D6 [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] [[Laser Battery|batteries]] were installed aboard the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2007-03-19 -->''[[Star Wars: Complete Cross-Sections]]''
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
*<!-- 2014-10-14 -->''[[Star Wars: Imperial Handbook: A Commander's Guide]]''
